goals.title: A
goals.objective: Structural alignment — split/rename Rust files to match Python file names for the 8 CONSOLIDATED crates (ccb-daemon 280 gaps, ccb-providers 428, ccb-cli 161, ccb-message-bureau 30, ccb-agents 38, ccb-memory 26, ccb-terminal 31, ccb-provider-hooks 9). Use subagents in parallel per crate.

goals.title: B
goals.objective: Functional translation — for Python files with no Rust equivalent logic, create new .rs with translated code (~200-300 files across all packages)

goals.title: C
goals.objective: Mark/skip — for internal helper/runtime subpackages replaced by Rust architecture, create documented stub .rs files explaining why not applicable (~150-200 files)

goals.title: D
goals.objective: Compile gate — cargo build --workspace + cargo test --workspace + cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets + cargo fmt --check all pass after A/B/C complete

claudeObjective: Complete all ultragoal stories in .omc/ultragoal/plans/1781454825275-phase-full-1-1-python-rust-file-alignmen/goals.json: G001-a A; G002-b B; G003-c C; G004-d D
